text_block_list.text:
Tis the season, and the students of Tracen
Academy are in high spirits...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Trainer, ya gotta help me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'll explain later! For now, we gotta get movin'!

A very panicky Taiki Shuttle takes me all the way
to the Miho Dormitory cafeteria.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hishiama, I brought the most reliable person I
could think of to help!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: And that person is your trainer?! You know only students are allowed in the dorm!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whoops... I plumb forgot. But didn't ya say you'd kill for more help?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want ya to kill anyone, so I reckoned my
trainer could pitch in!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well... there's no helpin' it now. I'll allow it just
this once, so please give us a hand!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Since it's the holidays and all, we're gonna throw
a surprise party for everybody in the dorm!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Taiki asked me for permission to use the
cafeteria. Once I heard why, I couldn't just sit
back and not help.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But now we've got a situation on our hands—this
job is way too big for the two of us.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: That's why we need your help, Trainer!

Sounds like they're trying to spread some holiday
cheer with a party.

Considering Taiki's desire to make everyone
happy, this is just the sort of thing I'd expect her
to get mixed up in.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yahoo! Thanks a million, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Then let's start plannin'! I'll man the grill!

The party I suddenly find myself assisting with
ends up being well worth the effort.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for putting together such a wonderful
party, Taiki.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Grass! Havin' fun? Don't hold back now, ya
hear?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Everything is so delicious! Taiki, you've really
done it, amiga!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I always rake in the compliments at my
barbeques! My seasoning could use a little work,
but I'm confident on the grill!

The students all enjoy the party with huge smiles
plastered on their faces.

I'm starting to see why Taiki Shuttle is so fond of
making people happy.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'd say that was a rip-roarin' success! Ain't no
greater joy than seein' everybody happy!
choice_data_list: I'm glad everyone had a good time.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Me too! And it's all thanks to you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But did ya find time to enjoy yourself too? It
looked to me like all ya did was serve everybody
else the whole time...
Grrrowl...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Sounds like your stomach is beggin' for help
too, Trainer!

Come to think of it, I was so busy that I didn't get
around to eating anything myself.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Let's mosey on back to the cafeteria, and
I'll fix ya up somethin' special!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I don't know much about seasoning, but my grillin'
skills are top-notch, so eat your fill!

Taiki Shuttle and I continue the party over some
plates of slightly salty food.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: By the way—I've got a gift for ya, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hishiama prepped this one with me and taught
me how to season it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: This'll make ya happy for sure! So dig in!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: My pleasure! If you're happy, I'm happy!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: And I'm happy you're my trainer too... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All right, you have a good night, now! I really
appreciate ya helpin' us out today!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Make sure ya rest up! Tomorrow's the
post-holiday party!

Despite her parting words sounding like certain
trouble, it's definitely been a holiday season to
remember.
